summary: Venue Home page feature fully tested. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features working - login redirects to /venue/home, 7 module cards displayed with correct navigation, theme toggle works. Fixed 2 bugs: TAP and Table back buttons were navigating to /pulse/entry instead of /venue/home.
